name: Regsvr32 Proxy Execution (Squiblydoo)
description: Detects regsvr32.exe used to execute scriptlets from remote sources
query:
// Detect regsvr32 loading remote scriptlets
// Trigger on regsvr32 /s /n /u /i with URL or scrobj
events from edr_process
where exe_path matches "(?i)regsvr32\.exe$"
  and cmdline matches "(?i)(/s|/n|/u|/i:http|scrobj\.dll|\\temp\\|\\tmp\\)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
